3217610.name: Duels Soccer Demo
3217610.description:
Duels Soccer Demo: Experience the Fun Now!

Discover a taste of the fun and mayhem of Duels Soccer with this demo version! Immerse yourself in the game that combines skill, strategy and a touch of luck, in a unique and electrifying soccer experience.

What you'll find in the demo

  • 2 Unique Arenas: Play in two different settings - a classic soccer stadium and a vibrant beach, each with its own visual characteristics and challenges.

  • 4 Selectable Characters: Choose from four different characters, all with unique looks to make the matches more fun and personalized.

  • Versus Mode for 2 Players: Take on a friend in Versus mode, which requires the use of two gamepads for exciting matches and intense disputes.

Play now and get a taste of what's to come in the full Duels Soccer!
